moduleTitle: Identification, assessment, and management of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities
questionText: How does your organization define short-, medium-, and long-term time horizons in relation to the identification, assessment, and management of your environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities?
questionKo: 환경 의존성 , 임팩트 ( impacts), 리스크 및 기회를 식별하고 평가하며 관리할 때 귀사가 정의하는 단기 ( short-term), 중기 ( medium-term), 및 장기 ( long-term) 의 시간적 기준을 입력하십시오 .
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Understanding organizations' definitions of time horizons allows data users to contextualize the different timescales at which organizations consider environmental issues in the identification, assessment, and management of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities, and how this informs their business strategy and financial planning.

columns.text: Is your long-term time horizon open ended?
How this time horizon is linked to strategic and/or financial planning
columns.textKo: 시간 기준이 전략 및/또는 재무계획과 어떻게 연관되는지 설명

guidance.text:
From (years) (column 1) and To (years) (column 3) 
To define your short-, medium- and long-term time horizons, provide details of the length of time in the "From" and "To" years columns (e.g., from 5 to 10 years, or from 12 to 25 years). 
How this time horizon is linked to strategic and/or financial planning (column 4) 
Provide the reasons for the choice of time horizon and explain how the use of this time horizon supports your strategic and/or financial planning. 
If you undertake strategic and/or financial planning under a different timeframe, explain why the time horizon chosen for the identification, assessment, and management of environmental issues is different to that used in these other processes.
guidance.textKo: 시작연도 (열 1) 및 종료연도 (열 3) To define your 단기, 중기 및 장기 시간 기준, 세부 정보를 입력 의 length of time in the "From" 및 "To" years 열 (e.g., from 5 to 10 years, 또는 from 12 to 25 years). How this time horizon is linked to 전략 및/또는 재무계획 (열 4) Provide the reasons 에 대한 choice of time horizon 및 explain how the use of this time horizon supports your 전략 및/또는 재무계획. 만약 you undertake 전략 및/또는 재무계획 under a different timeframe, 그 이유를 설명 the time horizon chosen 에 대한 식별, 평가 및 관리 of environmental issues is different to that used in these other 프로세스es.

guidance.text:
TCFD and TNFD position on time horizons: 
Because the timing of effects on organizations will vary, specifying set timeframes across sectors could hinder organizations' consideration of the environmental risks and opportunities specific to their businesses. 
TCFD and TNFD do not define timeframes and encourage respondents to decide how to define their own timeframes considering the useful life of their assets or infrastructure, the profile of the environmental risks they face, the sectors and geographies in which they operate, and that environmental risks and opportunities can manifest themselves over the medium and long term. 
In assessing environmental issues, organizations should be sensitive to the timeframe used to conduct their assessments. While many organizations conduct operational and financial planning over a 1-2-year timeframe, and strategic and capital planning over a 2-5-year timeframe, environmental risks and opportunities may have implications over a longer period. It is therefore important for organizations to consider the appropriate timeframes when assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities.
guidance.textKo: TCFD 및 TNFD position on time horizons: Because the timing of effects on organizations will vary, specifying set timeframes across sectors could hinder organizations' consideration 의 environmental 리스크 및 기회 specific to their businesses. TCFD 및 TNFD do not define timeframes 및 encourage respondents to decide how to define their own timeframes considering the useful life 의ir assets 또는 infrastructure, the profile 의 environmental risks they face, the sectors 및 geographies in which they operate, 및 that environmental 리스크 및 기회 can manifest themselves over the medium 및 long term. In assessing environmental issues, organizations 해야 합니다 be sensitive to the timeframe used to conduct their assessments. While many organizations conduct operational 및 재무계획 over a 1-2-year timeframe, 및 strategic 및 capital planning over a 2-5-year timeframe, environmental 리스크 및 기회 may have implications over a longer period. It is therefore important for organizations to consider the appropriate timeframes 경우 assessing 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Consecutive time horizons entered in rows 'Short-term', 'Medium-term', 'Long-term' - 3 points
(Please note: As an example, 'Short-term' is '0-2', 'Medium term' is '3-9', and 'Long-term' is 'from 10 years' OR 'Short-term' is '0-3', 'Medium-term' is '3-10' and 'Long-term' is 'from 10 years'. If 'No' is selected in column 'Is your long-term time horizon open ended?', column 'To (years)' must be completed to be eligible for awareness points.)
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Consecutive time horizons entered in 행 '단기', '중기', '장기' - 3 점 (Please note: As an example, '단기' is '0-2', 'Medium term' is '3-9', 및 '장기' is 'from 10 years' 또는 '단기' is '0-3', '중기' is '3-10' 및 '장기' is 'from 10 years'. 만약 '아니요' is 선택 in 열 '장기 시간 기준의 종료연도가 개방형입니까?', 열 '종료연도' 완료해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for awareness 점.) 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다.

change.question_ko: [국문 번역 검토 필요] How does your organization define short-, medium-, and long-term time horizons in relation to the identification, assessment, and management of your environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities?
change.q2025_text: How does your organization define short-, medium-, and long-term time horizons in relation to the identification, assessment, and management of your environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities?

2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked

change.q2025_textKo: 귀사는 define 단기, 중기 및 장기 시간 기준 in relation to the 식별, 평가 및 관리 of your 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회을/를 어떻게 수행합니까?

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

moduleTitleKo: 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회의 식별, 평가 및 관리
issueTagsKo: 수자원, 해양, 생물다양성, 플라스틱, Climate Change, 산림
sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Understanding organizations' definitions of time horizons allows 데이터 사용자 to contextualize the different timescales at which organizations consider environmental issues in the 식별, 평가 및 관리 of dependencies, impacts, risks, 및 opportunities, 및 how this informs their 사업전략 및 재무계획.
